CustomField.formula:
IF( AND ( OR ( ISPICKVAL(ContactStatus__c, "false"), HasOptedOutOfEmail = true , Global_Hardbounced__c = true, UnwantedforEvent__c = true, ISPICKVAL(ContactStatus__c, "true")), OR(GDPR_external_request_for_data_deletion__c= true, To_Delete__c = true)), (IMAGE("/resource/1706526257000/StatusGDPRDelete?", "GDPR Deleted", 30, 80)),
IF ( AND( ISPICKVAL(ContactStatus__c, "false"), OR(NOT(GDPR_external_request_for_data_deletion__c= true), NOT(To_Delete__c = true))),
(IMAGE("/resource/1706526160000/StatusInactive?", "Inactive", 30,80)) ,
IF ( AND ( OR ( Global_Hardbounced__c = true, UnwantedforEvent__c = true, ISPICKVAL(ContactStatus__c, "true")), HasOptedOutOfEmail = true), (IMAGE("/resource/1706526180000/StatusOptOut?", "Opt-Out", 30, 80)), IF ( AND ( OR ( UnwantedforEvent__c = true, ISPICKVAL(ContactStatus__c, "true")), Global_Hardbounced__c = true), (IMAGE("/resource/1706526198000/StatusHardBounced?", "Hardbounced", 30, 80)), IF ( AND( UnwantedforEvent__c = true, ISPICKVAL(ContactStatus__c, "true")), (IMAGE("/resource/1706526232000/StatusUnwanted?", "Unwanted", 30, 80)), (IMAGE("/resource/1706526122000/StatusActive?", "Active", 30,80)) )))))
CustomField.label: Contact Status Logo
